pages.text: Shelled humanoid. Bipedal tortoise-folk with a permanent dorsal shell that occupies the chest slot.$(br2)Height: 0.85$(br)Width: 1.3$(br2)$(bold)Shell Guard.$(/) Attacks landing from behind deal 60% reduced damage.$(br2)$(bold)Claws.$(/) Bare-hand attacks (empty mainhand) deal +1 damage.$(br2)$(bold)Deep Lungs.$(/) Holds breath underwater for approximately 60 seconds before drowning begins. Resets at the surface.$(br2)$(bold)Plodding.$(/) Movement speed reduced 25%.
